data.title: Zoth theft loss reached $8.32 million, the attacker's funds came from ChangeNOW
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to MistTrack monitoring, Zoth suffered a total loss of about 8.32 million US dollars in the attack. Tracking shows that the attacker's initial funding source was the ChangeNOW platform address. 
Earlier news, SlowMist tweeted that the core logic contract of the Zoth platform was replaced with a malicious contract due to the leakage of the administrator's private key.

data.title: 3e Network plans to acquire 4.9% stake in crypto mining platform HashBeaver at a valuation of US$30 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Nasdaq-listed 3e Network (Sanyi Technology) announced that it has signed a memorandum of understanding (MoU) with Singapore digital currency mining platform HASH BEAVER PTE. LTD (HashBeaver), intending to acquire 4.9% of the latter's equity at a valuation of US$30 million. It is reported that 3e Network also plans to explore the integration of its B2B software with HashBeaver's blockchain infrastructure.

data.title: Crypto bars and entertainment spots are invading Washington
data.description:
Washington has welcomed pubs and entertainment venues that accept crypto payments exclusively.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/crypto-bars-spots-are-invading-washington/

data.title: Crypto Sleuth Claims Mysterious $20M ‘Hyperliquid Whale’ Is Tied To Illicit Activity
data.description:
Crypto detective ZachXBT alleged that the mysterious “Hyperliquid whale” that’s been making headlines across the crypto community is suspected to be a convicted criminal from the UK. The trader has made around $20 million in profit from leveraged trading, raising questions about their identity. Related Reading: Bitcoin To Get ‘Interesting’ As Price Retests $85,000 – Here Are The Levels To Watch Mysterious Hyperliquid Whale Not A Crypto Insider On Thursday, ZachXBT shared an investigation revealing the “Hyperliquid Whale” as a British hacker previously charged with multiple crimes. The trader’s identity has been a hot topic among crypto investors over the past few weeks
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/crypto-sleuth-claims-mysterious-20m-hyperliquid-whale-is-tied-to-illicit-activity/

data.title: GoPlus officially announced that it has completed KYB verification and will soon launch a buyback plan
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official tweet of GoPlus Security, the repurchase of GPS tokens was delayed due to the need to open a Binance corporate account. At present, its parent company has completed the corporate identity verification (KYB) and the repurchase procedure is about to start. Previously, the community questioned the progress of the process due to the failure to communicate in time. GoPlus promised to strengthen information transparency in the future and simultaneously promote the development of cross-chain assets and product functions. The relevant results will be announced in one week.

data.title: Zoth Platform Experiences Significant Loss Due to Security Breach
data.description:
According to PANews, Zoth platform has suffered a major security breach resulting in a loss of approximately $8.5 million. The incident occurred due to the leakage of the administrator's private key, which allowed the core logic contract to be replaced with a malicious one.

MistTrack monitoring revealed that the attack led to a total loss of around $8.32 million. The stolen funds are currently located at the address 0x7b0c…60cf. Further investigation indicates that the attacker's initial funds originated from the ChangeNOW platform address 0x3b33…01e5.

data.title: SlowMist: Zoth was attacked due to administrator privilege leakage, and the contract was replaced with a malicious version
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to SlowMist monitoring, the Zoth platform was suspected to have been attacked due to administrator privilege leakage, and the core logic contract was tampered with and replaced with a malicious contract.

data.title: LBank has launched quq (QUQ)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank has launched quq (QUQ) at 17:40 (SGT) on March 21, 2025, and opened the QUQ/USDT trading pair. At present, the deposit service has been opened, and the withdrawal service will be opened at 18:00 on March 22, 2025.

data.title: Venice Token (VVV) is now available on Bybit
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News On March 21, Bybit AI Star Creation Camp Venice Token (VVV) has landed on Bybit spot. It is reported that Bybit Star Creation Camp is an AI project talent show launched by Bybit. Users vote to determine the project ranking and online qualifications, and can share a $1 million prize pool.

data.title: Ordinals founder: Agents is not an upgrade to the Runes protocol AMM and development has not yet begun
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Ordinals founder Casey posted a statement on the X platform to clarify that "Agents" is not the AMM that people often talk about, nor is it a protocol upgrade, and is not part of ord1.0, and Agents have not even started to be developed.
